validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.

success.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you shortly.
success.thankYouBookCall: We've got your details and will be in touch shortly to schedule your 20-minute call.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.introLine1: We would love to hear from you whether you have a question, feedback,
contact.introLine2: or just want to say hello.
contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subtext: Tell us briefly what you are working on and how we can help.
contact.subtextLine2: We read every message and respond as soon as we can.
